de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.dl.translation

Class DLSpecFactory

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.dl.translation.DLSpecFactory

  • public final class DLSpecFactory
extends Object
    A factory for creating class invariants and operation contracts from DL specifications. For an example, see java_dl/DLContractChooser.

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private Services services 

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      DLSpecFactory(Services services) 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      ClassInvariant createDLClassInvariant(String name, String displayName, ParsableVariable selfVar, Term inv)
      Creates a class invariant from a formula and a designated "self".
      FunctionalOperationContract createDLOperationContract(String name, Term fma, Term modifies)
      Creates an operation contract from an implication formula of the form "pre -> {heapAtPre := heap} [#catchAll(java.lang.Throwable exc){m();}]post", (where the update and/or the #catchAll may be omitted) and a modifies clause.
      private ProgramVariable extractExcVar(Term fma) 
      private LocationVariable extractHeapAtPre(Term fma) 
      private UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation extractInst(Term fma) 
      private Modality extractModality(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst) 
      private ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> extractParamVars(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst) 
      private Term extractPost(Term fma) 
      private Term extractPre(Term fma) 
      private IProgramMethod extractProgramMethod(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst) 
      private ProgramVariable extractResultVar(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst) 
      private ProgramVariable extractSelfVar(UseOperationContractRule.Instantiation inst)

        public ClassInvariant createDLClassInvariant(String name,

                                    ParsableVariable selfVar,

        Creates a class invariant from a formula and a designated "self".

      • createDLOperationContract

        public FunctionalOperationContract createDLOperationContract(String name,
                                                    Term fma,
                                                    Term modifies)
                                                      throws ProofInputException
        Creates an operation contract from an implication formula of the form "pre -> {heapAtPre := heap} [#catchAll(java.lang.Throwable exc){m();}]post", (where the update and/or the #catchAll may be omitted) and a modifies clause.
        Throws:
        ProofInputException
